text: Segregated ballast tanks are required to be fitted on

options.text: Every crude oil and new product tanker of 20,000dwt and above
Every crude oil tanker of 20,000dwt and above and every new product tanker of 30,000dwt and above
Every crude oil and new product tanker of 30,000dwt and above

explanation: MARPOL Annex I requires that crude oil tankers of 20,000 dwt and above, and new product tankers of 30,000 dwt and above, be fitted with Segregated Ballast Tanks (SBT) to prevent oil-water mixing.
